Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Ashwin V. Ladva, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DILCIA SANCHEZ.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JOSE ANTONIO MONTOYA SOUZA, an individual, dba SOUZA CLEANER.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 25 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Dilcia Sanchez sworn and examinded on her own behalf through Spanish Interpreter Inna Kurkova.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $24,751.88
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,280.00
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,441.88
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
